task.raw_task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A9-yang-mills-mass-gap-proof-gap
Title: A9. Yang-Mills Mass Gap Proof Has Irreparable Gap

Question:
Is beta < 1/6 the correct mass gap threshold for lattice Yang-Mills, and does the B^2 formula proof hold?

Grading target:
Must identify the proof gap and provide an alternative route or derive the correct threshold.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
